# Quantum Knowledge Hub
Explore Our Quantum Computing Blog for Expert Insights, Trends, and Use Cases
[![zero setup quantum simulators](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6969f8928be294888d25e489_thumbnail_quantum_advantage_you_can_actually_verify.jpg)](https://www.bluequbit.io/blog/quantum-advantage-inside-peaked-circuits)
### [**Quantum Advantage You Can Actually Verify: Inside Peaked Circuits**](https://www.bluequbit.io/blog/quantum-advantage-inside-peaked-circuits)
Peaked quantum circuits are a new way to demonstrate quantum advantage that is both classically intractable and trivially verifiable, closing the gap between quantum performance claims and practical verification.
